channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: WNBA draftees turn attention to making rosters as training camp opens in a few weeks
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Paige Bueckers will be heading to Dallas, the latest transcendent college star to go No. 1 in the WNBA draft. Her spot is assured with the Wings.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Concerns mount at Red Bull after Verstappen's 'catastrophe' as F1 heads to Saudi Arabia
item.description: Max Verstappen and Red Bull are one of Formula 1's all-time most successful partnerships. But a disastrous race has raised concerns Verstappen could consider a move elsewhere. Following the Bahrain Grand Prix, Verstappen talked of a “catastrophe” as he listed the problems.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fashion, heritage and talent: Players turn the WNBA draft into a cultural showcase
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The WNBA draft has increasingly become a platform for more than just athleticism — it is a celebration of identity, heritage, culture, and self-expression. Paige Bueckers may have been the No. 1 pick, but it was Kiki Iriafen who arguably stole the show when it came to fashion.
item.dc:creator: BRYANNA MAXWELL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ivan Demidov scores in NHL debut with Montreal Canadiens
item.description: MONTREAL (AP) — Ivan Demidov made quite the first impression in his anticipated NHL debut on Monday night. The 19-year-old Russian forward had a goal and an assist in the first period of Montreal's 4-3 shootout loss against Chicago. The Canadiens wasted an opportunity to clinch a playoff spot.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Keller's four points leads Utah past Nashville, 7-3
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (ABC4 Sports) - With nothing to play for but pride, the Utah Hockey Club is out to finish the season strong.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nazar scores in shootout to give Blackhawks 4-3 win over Canadiens
item.description: Frank Nazar scored the only goal of the shootout, and the Chicago Blackhawks beat Montreal 4-3 on Monday night, spoiling Canadiens rookie Ivan Demidov's NHL debut.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: WNBA assembles task force to help combat online hate toward players and teams
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — WNBA Commissioner Cathy Engelbert announced shortly before the draft Monday that the league has assembled a dedicated task force to help combat online hate and vitriol directed toward players and teams.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz reflect on tough season, look to the future
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz finished the 2024-25 season not with just the worst record in the NBA, but the worst in franchise history. At 17-65, Jazz fans are extremely frustrated, but the Jazz brass insist brighter days are ahead.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Why Harper, Schwarber, Turner believe Posey will excel as SF Giants’ team president
item.description: Posey faced Bryce Harper, Kyle Schwarber and Trea Turner's teams in the playoffs during his playing career for the Giants.
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Yankees' Aaron Judge to be US captain at 2026 World Baseball Classic
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Appointed U.S. captain for next year's World Baseball Classic, Aaron Judge will be playing for more than himself and his teammates. “It’s something special getting a chance to represent our country,” the New York Yankees star said after manager Mark DeRosa's announcement Monday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Stanford attorney to investigate water polo coach Brian Flacks
item.description: Sejal H. Patel has been retained by the university to investigate retaliation allegations after initial investigation did not substantiate allegations of misconduct.
item.dc:creator: Scott Reid, The Mercury News

item.title: Ex-PGA Tour pro Steve Elkington rips CBS for call on Rory McIlroy's potential disaster putt
item.description: Ex-PGA Tour pro Steve Elkington was highly critical of Jim Nantz's call during Rory McIlroy's 18th hole putt that forced a playoff at The Masters.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boxing legend George Foreman remembered for his love of family, faith and cheeseburgers
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — George Foreman was remembered Monday in a memorial service in his hometown of Houston for his legendary boxing career as well as for his love of God, family, horses and cheeseburgers and for his desire to help his fellow man. “He preached love all the time.
item.dc:creator: JUAN A. LOZANO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US-based Original Six Red Wings, Rangers, Bruins, Blackhawks eliminated from playoffs for 1st time
item.description: The Original Six teams based in the United States have a rich history, combining to hoist the Stanley Cup 27 times. And now, they share an unwanted distinction. Detroit, Boston, Chicago and the New York Rangers will all miss the playoffs in the same year for the first time in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kyle Larson and Denny Hamlin renew rivalry at Bristol with their seventh 1-2 finish
item.description: A second consecutive victory at Bristol Motor Speedway was especially sweet for Kyle Larson, and one reason loomed large in his rearview mirror.
item.dc:creator: NATE RYAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WWE boss pulls back curtain on John Cena heel turn ahead of WrestleMania 41
item.description: WWE's Chief Content Officer Paul Levesque opened about the behind-the-scenes talks with John Cena about turning him heel in a podcast interview.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Miami's Mario Cristobal delivers stern message to players thinking of NIL holdouts
item.description: Miami Hurricanes football coach Mario Cristobal sent a warning to players who were thinking of trying to pull an NIL holdout similar to what was seen in Tennessee.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Organizers unveil sleek metallic torches for Milan-Cortina Olympics and Paralympics
item.description: MILAN (AP) — Organizers for the Milan-Cortina Olympics on Monday unveiled a sleek and minimalistic metallic design for the torches that will be used in the traditional relay ahead of next year’s Winter Games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA's West spots set, with the Nuggets, Clippers and Timberwolves in and the Warriors play-in bound
item.description: The Los Angeles Clippers worked overtime to clinch a playoff spot — and send the Golden State Warriors to the NBA's play-in tournament.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Connor stars as Jets clinch Central Division title with shootout victory over Blackhawks
item.description: Kyle Connor and Cole Perfetti scored in the shootout, and the Winnipeg Jets clinched the franchise’s first Central Division title and the No. 1 seed for the Western Conference playoffs with a wild 5-4 victory over the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Race fans brace the rain for 1st race of Spring Tripleheader in Bristol Motor Speedway
item.description: Despite the weather, fans still showed up to enjoy the Bristol Motor Speedway on Friday night to see their favorite NASCAR drivers.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: White Sox face the Red Sox with 1-0 series lead
item.description: Boston Red Sox (7-8, third in the AL East) vs. Chicago White Sox (3-10, fifth in the AL Central) Chicago; Saturday, 4:10 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Augusta man attends 62 Masters in a row
item.description: For many people, they’ll wait their whole life to go to The Masters. For others, they’ve been going their whole life.
item.dc:creator: Karlton Clay, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox enter matchup with the Red Sox on losing streak
item.description: Boston Red Sox (7-7, third in the AL East) vs. Chicago White Sox (2-10, fifth in the AL Central) Chicago; Friday, 7:40 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Congrats to Beth - the Beat Big Will Bracket Challenge Winner
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — The final buzzer has sounded. The confetti has fallen. The Florida Gators are National Champions. KREX Sports Anchor Big Will Levenson was in the building to watch his Alma Mater Florida rise to the top of the College Basketball World. "Greatest experience of my life.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Babe Ruth's former Florida home goes up for sale for nearly $2M
item.description: The 1924 craftsman bungalow, located in St. Petersburg's Historic Old Northeast neighborhood, once belonged to Ruth, according to the real estate listing.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, NewsNation

item.title: Loyola University Chicago sent preservation notice tied to federally indicted ex-Michigan coach
item.description: Loyola University Chicago has received a preservation notice from attorneys representing a former student-athlete, compelling the school to preserve evidence related to the indictment of former Michigan football assistant coach Matt Weiss on unauthorized computer access and identity theft charges.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
